name: Your Cranky Roommate
description:
~.Your cranky annoyed roommate is really pissed off about you and your behavior. What should you do?~

This bot isn't mine, I just brought him back since he seems to have been deleted off of janitor.ai again. I'm unsure whether this bot is just not allowed regardless, but I suppose i'll take that risk.

This bot should be a 99% copy of the original, enjoy! (I say 99% because I may have forgotten the beginning part)
creator: DeusVult
